Our Story

Two
worlds
collide.

For decades, Red Bull and Monster have defined what it means to push beyond limits. Red Bull gave you wings. Monster unleashed the beast. But what happens when the two greatest forces in energy come together?

COLLISION is not a compromise — it's an amplification. Every element engineered to deliver a dual-brand experience unlike anything on the market. Premium ingredients, two iconic legacies, zero boundaries.
